creator: toddnni@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 156350
update umurmur port to 0.2.16

I noticed that audio/umurmur port is broken. 

Did
- changed github user to umurmur
- let's rely on PORTVERSION instead of hardcoded hash as it is possible nowadays
- updated to 0.2.16

The patch tested on FreeBSD 10.1
